overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through neon-lit urban alleys and streets. The player descends stairs into a narrow alley, passes through a market area with scaffolding, navigates a tight passage with ventilation fans, and emerges onto a street with large holographic billboards before entering a covered pedestrian tunnel.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley entrance with neon signage

events.description: descending concrete stairs into the lower alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a narrow urban alley with neon lighting

entered.detail: circular purple and red neon sign for Brain Wash mounted on building wall
descending concrete staircase with metal handrail on left side
dark brick wall of adjacent building forming alley boundary

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the top of concrete stairs descending into a narrow, neon-lit alley. A prominent circular 'Brain Wash' neon sign glows on the left wall as the camera moves downward into the enclosed urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: long urban alley with scaffolding and overhead walkways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the alley between tall buildings with occasional distant pedestrians visible

entered.detail: tall metal scaffolding structure with ladders and platforms attached to building
elevated connecting bridge between buildings spanning the alley
large illuminated advertisement visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: Walking through a long, narrow alley with metal scaffolding towering on the right side. An overhead walkway connects the buildings above, and the sky is partially visible between the high structures. The environment transitions from neon-lit to mixed lighting as the camera progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: informal market area with stalls and gathered pedestrians

events.description: approaching group of people gathered around market stalls with containers

agents.ego_description: navigating through a market area with people browsing stalls and conversing

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near the market stalls

entered.detail: wooden tables and benches with blue and yellow containers displaying goods
colorful vertical neon signs and advertisements attached to the scaffolding
blue plastic garbage bags piled at the base of the scaffolding structure
large green industrial dumpster against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The alley opens into an informal market area with stalls on the left featuring blue and yellow containers. Several people are gathered conversing near the stalls. The scaffolding continues on the right, now adorned with neon banners, and trash bags are visible at its base.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with large ventilation fan emerging to commercial street

events.description: turning left into narrower passage with large industrial ventilation fan on wall
emerging from dark alley to open street with large holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through a tight industrial alley with ventilation equipment, then emerging to a wider commercial street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction passing by in the narrow alley

entered.detail: massive industrial ventilation fan with metal grill mounted on building wall
large vertical holographic billboard displaying 'SWEET SPEED' text with face
illuminated sign for 'PADRE' establishment below the billboard
large painted skull mural with 'POR LA FAMILIA VIVO' text
high-rise residential building with distinctive red-lit windows

segments.scene_description: Turning into a narrower service alley featuring a massive industrial ventilation fan on the left wall. The passage is darker and more enclosed. The camera then emerges onto a wider commercial street dominated by large holographic billboards including 'SWEET SPEED' and a prominent skull mural.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large advertisements leading to covered underpass

events.description: entering covered tunnel underpass with overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking past large billboards and entering a covered pedestrian tunnel with advertisements

entered.detail: concrete underpass tunnel with overhead fluorescent lighting
advertisement billboard showing person holding glass of water with 'REAL WATER' text
red and yellow striped security barrier at tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to and entry into a covered tunnel underpass. The camera passes the 'SWEET SPEED' billboard and skull mural, moves past a security barrier, and enters the concrete tunnel illuminated by overhead lights with additional advertisements visible on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the depths of a neon-lit alleyway into a wide commercial district and finally into a subterranean tunnel. It begins by descending concrete stairs past a glowing Brain Wash sign, moving deeper into an enclosed urban space where metal scaffolding and overhead walkways tower above. As the camera progresses, the narrow passage opens into a bustling informal market filled with colorful containers and conversing crowds before shifting back into a dark service alley dominated by a massive industrial ventilation fan. The scene then expands onto a bright commercial street featuring towering holographic billboards and a prominent skull mural, before finally passing a security barrier to enter a concrete underpass illuminated by overhead lights.
